description: Style noteThis kurta by diva is designed to accentuate your femininity, combining traditional prints with a modern silhouette. Look stylish in this ethnic kurta and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it with denims and flats for an off-duty lookProduct detailsPink kurta with a mandarin collar, blue and purple detailing along the neckline, traditional artwork, three quarter sleeves and split side seamsMaterial and careBlended fabricDry clean onlySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing size S
